node.data: {"M8376":{"lit":"խայ<lb xml:id=\"l104237428\" facs=\"#z104237428\" n=\"4\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>տառակու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>դ","line":{"facs":"#z104237427","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104237427","n":"3"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8376-048a"},"n":"խայտառակութիդ"},"V1294":{"lit":"խայտառակու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>դ","line":{"facs":"#z104428726","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104428726","n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9119 copy"},"n":"խայտառակութիդ"},"M8375":{"lit":"խայտառակո<lb xml:id=\"l104031422\" facs=\"#z104031422\" n=\"3\" resp=\"#u2140\" break=\"no\"/>ւ<abbr>թի<\/abbr>դ","line":{"facs":"#z104031423","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104031423","n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8375.0044"},"n":"խայտառակութիդ"},"M6712":{"lit":"խայտառակու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>դ","line":{"facs":"#z104389871","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104389871","n":"27"},"column":{"n":"2"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"6712-134b"},"n":"խայտառակութիդ"},"M9307":{"lit":"խայտառակու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>դ","line":{"facs":"#z104206235","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l104206235","n":"6"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"9307-120b"},"n":"խայտառակութիդ"},"V146":{"lit":"խայտառակու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>դ","line":{"facs":"#z104313889","resp":"#u2140","break":"no","xml:id":"l104313889","n":"12"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"20180813_134302 copy"},"n":"խայտառակութիդ"},"M8699":{"lit":"խայտառակու<abbr>թի<\/abbr>դ","line":{"facs":"#z103941807","resp":"#u2140","xml:id":"l103941807","n":"14"},"context":"text/body/ab","page":{"n":"8699-071b"},"n":"խայտառակութիդ"}}
